requirement_topic.zh: CE 认证标志——低压指令及电磁兼容指令
requirement_topic.zht: CE 認證標誌——低壓指令及電磁兼容指令

summary.en: Industrial motors placed on the EU/EEA market must bear CE marking demonstrating conformity with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) for electrical safety and, where applicable, the Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2014/30/EU (EMCD). The manufacturer or EU-authorised representative must compile a technical file, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC), and affix the CE mark before placing the product on the market.
summary.zh: 在欧盟/欧经区市场销售的工业电机须贴附 CE 标志，证明符合低压指令 2014/35/EU（电气安全）及（如适用）电磁兼容指令 2014/30/EU。制造商或欧盟授权代表须编制技术文件、签发欧盟符合性声明（DoC）并在产品上加贴 CE 标志。
summary.zht: 在歐盟／歐洲經濟區市場銷售的工業電機須貼附 CE 標誌，證明符合低壓指令 2014/35/EU（電氣安全）及（如適用）電磁兼容指令 2014/30/EU。製造商或歐盟授權代表須編製技術文件、簽發歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）並在產品上加貼 CE 標誌。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMCD)
EN 60034-1 (IEC 60034-1) — Rotating electrical machines: rating and performance
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — Market Surveillance and Compliance

summary.en: China does not require CCC certification for most industrial three-phase AC motors (they are generally exempt from the CCC compulsory catalogue). Electrical safety is addressed under GB/T 755 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) and GB 12350 for small motors. EMC requirements apply under GB/T 10069 series (recommended standard, not mandatory). No single mandatory pre-market mark equivalent to CE exists for standard industrial motors in China. Note: the CCC catalogue is updated periodically by CNCA — verify the current catalogue if any scope doubt exists, as product-specific additions are possible.
summary.zh: 中国对大多数工业三相交流电机通常不要求 CCC 认证（一般豁免于 CCC 强制认证目录）。电气安全参照 GB/T 755（等同 IEC 60034-1）及小型电机 GB 12350；电磁兼容参照 GB/T 10069 系列（推荐性标准，非强制）。中国目前无等同 CE 的统一上市前强制标志要求。注：CNCA 会定期更新 CCC 目录，如有范围疑问应核查最新目录，因个别产品类别可能被新增。
summary.zht: 中國對大多數工業三相交流電機通常不要求 CCC 認證（一般豁免於 CCC 強制認證目錄）。電氣安全參照 GB/T 755（等同 IEC 60034-1）及小型電機 GB 12350；電磁兼容參照 GB/T 10069 系列（推薦性標準，非強制）。中國目前無等同 CE 的統一上市前強制標誌要求。注：CNCA 會定期更新 CCC 目錄，如有範圍疑問應核查最新目錄，因個別產品類別可能被新增。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 755-2019 (IEC 60034-1 equivalent)
GB 12350-2009 — Small power motors safety requirements
GB/T 10069 series — EMC for rotating machines
CNCA CCC catalogue (general industrial three-phase AC motors are not listed as compulsory products; verify current catalogue for any recent additions)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers typically hold no CE mark and have not prepared the EU-format technical file, DoC, or appointed an EU Authorised Representative. LVD and EMCD self-declaration requires test evidence to harmonised EN standards (e.g. EN 60034-1) which may differ from GB/T test conditions. CE affixing without a complete technical file is a legal violation in the EU.
gap.zh: 中国制造商通常未持有 CE 标志，未按欧盟格式编制技术文件或符合性声明，也未指定欧盟授权代表。LVD 与 EMCD 自我声明要求按欧盟协调标准（如 EN 60034-1）进行测试，其测试条件可能与 GB/T 有所不同。在未完成完整技术文件的情况下加贴 CE 标志在欧盟属违法行为。
gap.zht: 中國製造商通常未持有 CE 標誌，未按歐盟格式編製技術文件或符合性聲明，亦未指定歐盟授權代表。LVD 與 EMCD 自我聲明要求按歐盟協調標準（如 EN 60034-1）進行測試，其測試條件可能與 GB/T 有所不同。在未完成完整技術文件的情況下加貼 CE 標誌在歐盟屬違法行為。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required before placing on EU/EEA market
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for export — no equivalent pre-market CE-type requirement for standard industrial motors in China; domestic sale requires GB 755 compliance but no pre-market mark comparable to CE

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [Informational only] Chinese motor manufacturers exporting to the EU must obtain CE marking under LVD (and EMCD where relevant) before shipment. This requires harmonised-standard test evidence, a complete technical file, and an EU DoC. Without these, market entry is not lawful. Engaging an EU Authorised Representative or Notified Body is strongly advisable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向欧盟出口的中国电机制造商在发货前须取得 CE 标志（LVD 及如适用之 EMCD）。这要求提供协调标准测试证据、完整技术文件及欧盟符合性声明。未具备上述文件不得合法进入市场。强烈建议指定欧盟授权代表或通知机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向歐盟出口的中國電機製造商在發貨前須取得 CE 標誌（LVD 及如適用之 EMCD）。這要求提供協調標準測試證據、完整技術文件及歐盟符合性聲明。未具備上述文件不得合法進入市場。強烈建議指定歐盟授權代表或通知機構。

requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign Regulation 2019/1781 — Efficiency Class & Technical Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计法规 2019/1781——能效等级与技术文件
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計法規 2019/1781——能效等級與技術文件

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/1781 sets minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for electric motors placed on the EU market. From 1 July 2021, motors 0.75–1000 kW must meet IE3 (or IE2 with VFD). From 1 July 2023, the scope expanded to include motors 0.12–0.75 kW (IE2) and large motors up to 1000 kW (IE3). Manufacturers must: (1) ensure the motor achieves the required IE efficiency class as tested per IEC 60034-2-1; (2) publish efficiency values at 100%, 75%, and 50% load on the product nameplate AND on freely accessible websites; (3) compile technical documentation sufficient for conformity assessment; (4) include product information in any technical promotional material.
summary.zh: 欧盟法规 2019/1781 为投放欧盟市场的电动机设定最低能效标准（MEPS）。自 2021 年 7 月 1 日起，0.75–1000 kW 电机须达到 IE3 等级（或配变频器的 IE2）。自 2023 年 7 月 1 日起，范围扩展至 0.12–0.75 kW（IE2）及大型电机（IE3）。制造商须：(1) 确保电机按 IEC 60034-2-1 测试达到所需 IE 能效等级；(2) 在铭牌及可公开访问的网站上发布 100%、75% 及 50% 负载下的效率值；(3) 编制符合性评估所需的技术文件；(4) 在技术宣传材料中载入产品信息。
summary.zht: 歐盟法規 2019/1781 為投放歐盟市場的電動機設定最低能效標準（MEPS）。自 2021 年 7 月 1 日起，0.75–1000 kW 電機須達到 IE3 等級（或配變頻器的 IE2）。自 2023 年 7 月 1 日起，範圍擴展至 0.12–0.75 kW（IE2）及大型電機（IE3）。製造商須：(1) 確保電機按 IEC 60034-2-1 測試達到所需 IE 能效等級；(2) 在銘牌及可公開訪問的網站上發布 100%、75% 及 50% 負載下的效率值；(3) 編製符合性評估所需的技術文件；(4) 在技術宣傳材料中載入產品信息。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1781 — Ecodesign for electric motors and VFDs
IEC 60034-2-1 — Methods for determining losses and efficiency of rotating electrical machinery
IEC 60034-30-1 — Efficiency classes for line-operated AC motors (IE code)
Directive 2009/125/EC — Ecodesign Framework Directive

summary.en: China's GB 18613-2020 (mandatory since June 2021) sets minimum energy efficiency grades for three-phase asynchronous motors. Grade 3 (= IE3) is the mandatory minimum; Grade 2 (= IE4) is the voluntary energy-saving evaluation level; Grade 1 (= IE5) is the highest tier. Both GB 18613-2020 and EU Regulation 2019/1781 cover motors rated 0.12–1000 kW, so rated-power scope boundaries are broadly aligned. Motors must display the energy efficiency label per GB/T 28569. However, the information publication requirements (efficiency at multiple load points on nameplate AND website) and the format of technical documentation differ significantly from EU Ecodesign requirements.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 18613-2020（2021 年 6 月起强制实施）为三相异步电动机设定最低能效等级：3 级（= IE3）为法定最低，2 级（= IE4）为节能评价值（自愿级），1 级（= IE5）为最高等级。GB 18613-2020 与欧盟法规 2019/1781 均覆盖 0.12–1000 kW 额定功率范围，两者功率范围总体一致。电机须按 GB/T 28569 张贴能效标识。但多负载点效率信息的铭牌及网站发布要求，以及技术文件格式，与欧盟生态设计要求存在显著差异。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 18613-2020（2021 年 6 月起強制實施）為三相異步電動機設定最低能效等級：3 級（= IE3）為法定最低，2 級（= IE4）為節能評價值（自願級），1 級（= IE5）為最高等級。GB 18613-2020 與歐盟法規 2019/1781 均覆蓋 0.12–1000 kW 額定功率範圍，兩者功率範圍總體一致。電機須按 GB/T 28569 張貼能效標識。但多負載點效率信息的銘牌及網站發布要求，以及技術文件格式，與歐盟生態設計要求存在顯著差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for small and medium three-phase asynchronous motors
GB/T 28569-2012 — Energy efficiency labelling for small and medium three-phase asynchronous motors
GB/T 755-2019 — Ratings and performance (IEC 60034-1 equivalent)

gap.en: Key gaps for Chinese manufacturers targeting the EU: (1) Technical documentation must include test results per IEC 60034-2-1 at specified load points — Chinese factories often test to GB/T 1032 which may not be fully equivalent. (2) Efficiency values at 100%, 75%, and 50% load must appear on the nameplate AND on a publicly accessible manufacturer website — most Chinese nameplates omit the 75% and 50% load figures. (3) EU Ecodesign requires a specific product information sheet format; GB energy labels follow a different layout. (4) No IE efficiency class marking convention is mandated on the Chinese nameplate in the same format as EN/IEC labelling. These information-requirement gaps are frequently cited in EU market surveillance actions against non-EU motor suppliers.
gap.zh: 中国制造商进入欧盟市场的主要差距：(1) 技术文件须包含按 IEC 60034-2-1 在指定负载点进行的测试结果——中国工厂通常按 GB/T 1032 测试，两者未必完全等效。(2) 铭牌及制造商可公开访问网站均须标注 100%、75% 及 50% 负载下的效率值——大多数中国铭牌未列出 75% 及 50% 负载数据。(3) 欧盟生态设计要求特定格式的产品信息表，与 GB 能效标识布局不同。(4) 中国铭牌无强制要求按 EN/IEC 格式标注 IE 能效等级。上述信息要求差距是欧盟市场监管行动中针对非欧盟电机供应商的常见问题。
gap.zht: 中國製造商進入歐盟市場的主要差距：(1) 技術文件須包含按 IEC 60034-2-1 在指定負載點進行的測試結果——中國工廠通常按 GB/T 1032 測試，兩者未必完全等效。(2) 銘牌及製造商可公開訪問網站均須標注 100%、75% 及 50% 負載下的效率值——大多數中國銘牌未列出 75% 及 50% 負載數據。(3) 歐盟生態設計要求特定格式的產品信息表，與 GB 能效標識佈局不同。(4) 中國銘牌無強制要求按 EN/IEC 格式標注 IE 能效等級。上述信息要求差距是歐盟市場監管行動中針對非歐盟電機供應商的常見問題。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Regulation (EU) 2019/1781 directly applicable in all EU member states; non-compliant motors may not be placed on the EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 mandatory since June 2021 for motors within its scope; energy efficiency labelling per GB/T 28569 required

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [Informational only] Chinese motors meeting GB 18613-2020 Grade 2 may have the underlying efficiency performance to satisfy EU IE3 requirements, but this is not sufficient for EU market access. Manufacturers must additionally: test to IEC 60034-2-1, publish multi-load-point efficiency data on nameplates and websites, prepare EU-format technical documentation, and ensure CE marking under LVD. The information-publication and documentation package is the most commonly missing element.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合 GB 18613-2020 二级能效的中国电机在基础效率性能上可能达到欧盟 IE3 要求，但这不足以进入欧盟市场。制造商还须：按 IEC 60034-2-1 测试、在铭牌及网站发布多负载点效率数据、编制欧盟格式技术文件，并确保 LVD 下的 CE 标志合规。信息发布与技术文件包是最常见的缺失环节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合 GB 18613-2020 二級能效的中國電機在基礎效率性能上可能達到歐盟 IE3 要求，但這不足以進入歐盟市場。製造商還須：按 IEC 60034-2-1 測試、在銘牌及網站發布多負載點效率數據、編製歐盟格式技術文件，並確保 LVD 下的 CE 標誌合規。信息發布與技術文件包是最常見的缺失環節。

requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟责任人与市场监督（法规 2019/1020）
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟責任人與市場監督（法規 2019/1020）

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 on market surveillance and compliance requires that every product covered by EU harmonisation legislation (including motors under LVD and Ecodesign) placed on the EU market has an 'economic operator' established in the EU who can be held responsible. For non-EU manufacturers this means designating an EU Authorised Representative (AR) or ensuring the importer or fulfilment service provider accepts that role. The AR must: hold the EU Declaration of Conformity and technical documentation; cooperate with market surveillance authorities; and be identified by name and address on the product or packaging. From 16 July 2021, products without an EU-based responsible person may be refused market entry by customs.
summary.zh: 欧盟市场监督与合规法规 2019/1020 要求，凡受欧盟协调立法（包括 LVD 和生态设计指令下的电机）覆盖的产品在欧盟市场销售，须有一名在欧盟设立的「经济经营者」承担责任。对非欧盟制造商而言，须指定欧盟授权代表（AR），或确保进口商或履行服务提供商承担该角色。AR 须：持有欧盟符合性声明及技术文件；配合市场监督机关；并在产品或包装上标明姓名及地址。自 2021 年 7 月 16 日起，无欧盟责任人的产品可被海关拒绝入境。
summary.zht: 歐盟市場監督與合規法規 2019/1020 要求，凡受歐盟協調立法（包括 LVD 和生態設計指令下的電機）覆蓋的產品在歐盟市場銷售，須有一名在歐盟設立的「經濟經營者」承擔責任。對非歐盟製造商而言，須指定歐盟授權代表（AR），或確保進口商或履行服務提供商承擔該角色。AR 須：持有歐盟符合性聲明及技術文件；配合市場監督機關；並在產品或包裝上標明姓名及地址。自 2021 年 7 月 16 日起，無歐盟責任人的產品可被海關拒絕入境。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — Market surveillance and compliance of products
Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) Art. 10 — Authorised representatives
Regulation (EU) 2019/1781 Art. 8 — Obligations of economic operators

summary.en: China has no direct equivalent concept of a mandatory EU-style Authorised Representative for export products. Chinese exporters typically rely on their EU trading partner (distributor or importer) to fulfil market-entry obligations. CCC-certified products have a designated certificate holder within China, but this role does not extend to EU market accountability. No China-EU bilateral agreement creates regulatory equivalence for this role; EU law applies independently.
summary.zh: 中国对出口产品没有与欧盟授权代表直接对应的强制性制度。中国出口商通常依赖其欧盟贸易伙伴（经销商或进口商）履行市场准入义务。CCC 认证产品在中国境内有指定证书持有人，但该角色不延伸至欧盟市场的法律责任。中欧之间不存在为此角色建立监管等效的双边协议，欧盟法律独立适用。
summary.zht: 中國對出口產品沒有與歐盟授權代表直接對應的強制性制度。中國出口商通常依賴其歐盟貿易夥伴（經銷商或進口商）履行市場準入義務。CCC 認證產品在中國境內有指定證書持有人，但該角色不延伸至歐盟市場的法律責任。中歐之間不存在為此角色建立監管等效的雙邊協議，歐盟法律獨立適用。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — domestic market only, no EU equivalent role
No direct CN equivalent to EU Authorised Representative concept

gap.en: Chinese motor manufacturers selling directly to EU end-users (e.g. via online platforms or direct B2B) without an EU importer must designate an EU Authorised Representative before shipment. Many small and mid-size Chinese manufacturers are unaware of or ignore this requirement. Since July 2021, EU customs may detain shipments lacking a named EU responsible person on the product label or documentation. This gap is structural: it requires a contractual and legal arrangement with an EU-based entity, not merely a technical fix.
gap.zh: 中国电机制造商若直接向欧盟终端用户销售（例如通过在线平台或直接 B2B）且无欧盟进口商，须在发货前指定欧盟授权代表。许多中小型中国制造商对此要求不了解或忽视。自 2021 年 7 月起，欧盟海关可扣押产品标签或文件中未注明欧盟责任人的货物。这一差距属于结构性问题：需要与欧盟实体签订合同及法律安排，而非单纯的技术合规。
gap.zht: 中國電機製造商若直接向歐盟終端用戶銷售（例如透過在線平台或直接 B2B）且無歐盟進口商，須在發貨前指定歐盟授權代表。許多中小型中國製造商對此要求不了解或忽視。自 2021 年 7 月起，歐盟海關可扣押產品標籤或文件中未註明歐盟責任人的貨物。這一差距屬於結構性問題：需要與歐盟實體簽訂合同及法律安排，而非單純的技術合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required for all non-EU manufacturers placing products on the EU market under harmonisation legislation; enforceable at EU customs from 16 July 2021
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China has no outbound equivalent; compliance is the exporter's responsibility under EU law

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [Informational only] Chinese motor manufacturers exporting directly to EU customers must identify and contract an EU Authorised Representative (or ensure the EU importer accepts that liability) before the first shipment. Failure to do so is an independent ground for customs refusal and market withdrawal, separate from product-technical non-conformity. This is often the fastest-to-fix yet most-overlooked compliance gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直接向欧盟客户出口的中国电机制造商须在首次发货前确定并签约欧盟授权代表（或确保欧盟进口商承担该责任）。未能满足此要求是海关拒绝入境及市场撤回的独立理由，与产品技术不合规相互独立。这通常是最容易修复却最常被忽视的合规差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直接向歐盟客戶出口的中國電機製造商須在首次發貨前確定並簽約歐盟授權代表（或確保歐盟進口商承擔該責任）。未能滿足此要求是海關拒絕入境及市場撤回的獨立理由，與產品技術不合規相互獨立。這通常是最容易修復卻最常被忽視的合規差距。
